message.content:
Certainly! To provide a historically accurate and educational example, I will excerpt a brief passage from the late 19th century and analyze how it might have been evaluated by the courts under the prevailing standards for defining obscenity. Note that explicit sexual content will be depicted as minimally as possible for this example.

### Excerpt: Fanny Hill, 1749 (somewhat fictionalized)

**Passage:**
